fields.name: Nirmala Convent
fields.about:
Education is the key to unlocking the world, a passport to freedom." This quote from Oprah Winfrey summarises the importance of schooling in a single line.

Yet, the purpose of schooling is a debatable topic that brings forth many explanations.
If we took a step back to the 1800s, history would reveal that schooling back then
was to preserve and inculcate democratic values. Later, schools flourished with the purpose to prepare students for vocational courses. Much later, in the 1970s and 80s, the world became consumed by how well students performed in schools. Test scores became a top priority, and competition became rampant.
